arts.ttl: The Stoke City teammate determined to make Junior Tchamadeu a better player
arts.sum: The 21-year-old has clocked up more minutes than all-but three other players and, as he has found his best form at Stoke in recent weeks under Mark Robins, says he can see huge differences in his own game “When I look at myself from my first season here compared to now I’d say the biggest thing is my game understanding on the pitch,” he said on the new episode of Potters’ Pod.

arts.ttl: Stoke City reunion with Tyrese Campbell and Tom Cannon moved for live television coverage
arts.sum: Now aged 25, he has found form as he has found fitness and scored 10 times in 16 starts and 11 sub appearances, including in a 2-0 home win at Bramall Lane against Stoke in October. Cannon spent the first half of the season on loan at Stoke from Leicester, scoring 11 times before he was recalled to be sold on to Sheff Utd for £10 million.

arts.ttl: 10 summer signings in plans as rival boss prepares for Stoke City clash
arts.sum: Heckingbottom is particularly looking for players who can make a difference in one v one situations and break down teams to win tight games - after all, Preston have drawn 17 times so far this season. The difficulty will be finding players who can be an improvement on the ones who are leaving and help Preston try to end a run of mid-table finishes.
